sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lunggim mi aw, inn nuam om hi,
Kua tung nuam lo ding tua lai-ah.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ngak in (ngakngak in),thuak in thum loin ngak in,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Leitung a na thuak ding a hi,
En in, na tun nading innpi,
Ngak in, lungnem in-ah nggak in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A lutung a khu pa phawkin,
Lunggim na, dahna na tuah leh,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Sem in, na thuakna na thumna,
Hong zak loh khat beek om lo
